concepts.name: Polite Вие = вие-form for one person
Strong pronoun forms after prepositions (мен, теб)
Past tense of съм (бях, беше, бяхме...)
Dative liking: харесва ми ('it pleases me')
Object pronouns singular (ме, те, го, я)
Clitic placement with не and subject
Subject pronouns (аз, ти, той, тя, ние, вие, те)
